changeSet.author: hr-dev
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE JOB_POSTING ( ID NUMBER CONSTRAINT PK_JOB_POSTING PRIMARY KEY, TITLE VARCHAR2(200) CONSTRAINT NN_JP_TITLE NOT NULL, DEPARTMENT VARCHAR2(100), DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2(4000), REQUIRED_SKILLS VARCHAR2(2000) CONSTRAINT NN_JP_REQ_SKILLS NOT NULL, EXPERIENCE_YEARS NUMBER(3), LOCATION VARCHAR2(100), SALARY_MIN NUMBER(10,2), SALARY_MAX NUMBER(10,2), STATUS VARCHAR2(20) DEFAULT 'OPEN' CONSTRAINT NN_JP_STATUS NOT NULL, CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP CONSTRAINT NN_JP_CREATED_AT NOT NULL, UPDATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT CHK_JP_STATUS CHECK (STATUS IN ('OPEN','CLOSED','ON_HOLD','FILLED')) )
